body.title: Every emission carries a produced_by backward edge; ONE escalation verb dispatches failure to the producer's review (escalate-to-design, not admin)
body.text:
# D-feedback-edge-every-emission-2026-07-07
**title:** Every emission carries a produced_by backward edge; ONE escalation verb dispatches failure to the producer's review
**date:** 2026-07-07
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-feedback-edge-design, T-produced-by-emission-sweep, T-escalation-dispatch-producer-review, T-consequence-D-feedback-edge-every-emission

## Decision narrative
'Couldn't solve, escalate' was routing to admin-for-a-ticket, hiding the real signal: an unsolvable ticket is usually evidence of an under-specified or wrongly-decomposed upstream artifact. Intention flows forward (intent -> design -> decision -> ticket -> build -> proof); every artifact must flow backward too — not feedback loops here and there, but EVERY emission carrying a backward edge. The fix is ONE mechanism, not N paths (homogeneity over special-case): every emitted artifact carries produced_by; one escalation verb ('artifact failed downstream: how'); one dispatch rule routing the failure to the producer's review, recursively — like a compiler error blaming the source line via provenance, not the backend stage. This is the graph-tree telos in work clothes: forward edges are answers, backward edges are the questions a failure re-opens.

**Alternatives rejected:** (a) per-artifact-type escalation paths — the special-case trap that made rebuild-from-scratch look necessary; (b) rebuild-from-scratch — discards the proof corpus and falsified-hypothesis record and fixes rot level, not rot rate; (c) overloading the existing gate field as the backward edge — gate encodes blocked-until, not provenance.

**Constraints:** Granny is the SOLE ticket writer (D-granny-sole-ticket-writer-2026-07-07) — dispatch mutations go through her write-path. The escalation verb MAY land on the bus envelope: unseen_university/devices/bus/ is HIGH-inertia; impl tickets are gated on the design ticket and carry an Akien-pre-approval stamp requirement for any bus touch.

**Reconciliations:** complements D-dicksimnel-escalation-chain-2026-06-10 and T-inference-escalation-ladder-family-then-architect — tier escalation = capability miss ('try a stronger resolver'), produced_by escalation = spec miss; tier runs first, producer-dispatch fires on spec-shaped failure or top-tier exhaustion. Composes with D-dev-pipeline-stations-2026-07-07 (backward edges over the same stations) and generalizes D-intention-why-observation-2026-06-19 (the closed loop, extended to every artifact).

## Hypothesis
After these tickets ship, a 'couldn't solve' escalation lands in the producing decision's review queue with the produced_by chain attached; zero escalations route to the generic admin queue.

## Measurement Signal
Dispatch-point log line: escalation: artifact=<id> -> producer=<id> route=producer-review. Grep escalation records for target type: producer-review vs admin — admin count from produced_by-carrying artifacts should be 0.

## Intention
I intend that every emission in the pipeline carries a backward edge, so failure at any stage escalates to the artifact that produced it — the graph corrects itself instead of dumping errors into a generic inbox.

## Outcome check
/outcome at the consequence gate — 2026-07-21 or first real production escalation, whichever first.
